title: Draft review panel with approval workflow and document viewing
purpose: Provides a UI component for reviewing draft documents, toggling between view modes, and approving or rejecting drafts with user identification.
module_context: Exports a DraftReviewPanel component that manages draft review state including view mode, document tabs, approval/rejection flows, and integrates with a draft hook for diff data.

steps.content: Render a button element with styling based on whether the mode is currently active.
Apply active state styling when the button's mode matches the current view mode.
Set up click handler to update the view mode when clicked.
Map trigger type values to human-readable display strings.
Return the formatted string for known trigger types.
Return the original trigger type for unknown values.
Parse the input date string into a Date object.
Format the date using locale-specific formatting with year, month, day, hour, and minute.
Initialize state for view mode, active tab, approval/rejection form fields, and loading states.
Use a draft hook to retrieve diff data for the current topic.
Determine the current diff data based on the active tab.
Define a callback function to get content based on the current view mode and diff data.
Set up handlers for approve and reject actions with validation and loading states.
Render the header with title, trigger type, close button, and metadata.
Render document tabs for switching between document types.
Render the document viewer or diff viewer based on the current view mode.
Check if current diff data is available.
IF diff data is available, return the current and draft content from the diff.
ELSE return the current document content and draft document content from the draft prop.
Validate that the approver's name is provided.
IF the name is missing, show an alert and exit.
Set the approval loading state to true.
Call the onApprove callback with the trimmed approver name.
Reset the approval loading state after the operation completes.
Validate that the rejector's name is provided.
IF the name is missing, show an alert and exit.
Set the rejection loading state to true.
Call the onReject callback with the trimmed rejector name and optional reason.
Reset the rejection loading state after the operation completes.
